title: Hook for managing missing topic requests with mock data
purpose: Provides access to missing topic requests with loading states, error handling, and actions to dismiss or refresh the list.
module_context: Exports a React hook that manages state for missing topics using React hooks and returns an object with topics data, loading state, error state, and action functions.

steps.content: Initialize state for topics, loading, and error.
Define a callback function to fetch topics from mock data.
Fetch topics on component mount using useEffect.
Define a callback function to refresh the topics list.
Define a callback function to dismiss a specific topic.
Return the topics data, loading state, error state, and action functions.
Set the loading state to true and clear any existing error.
Simulate an API delay before proceeding.
Sort the mock topics by request count in descending order.
Update the topics state with the sorted mock data.
IF an error occurs during fetch, set the error state with a descriptive message.
Reset the loading state to false after the fetch attempt.
Await the fetch topics function to refresh the list.
Simulate an API call delay before proceeding.
Filter out the topic with the specified name from the current topics list.
Update the topics state with the filtered list.
